name: Community Service
tagline: Serving Atlanta with purpose — hands-on impact in the neighborhoods we call home.
overview: The Community Service committee leads E100's hands-on volunteer and service initiatives throughout Atlanta. From the Together Tailgate to the MLK Day of Service, National Volunteer Week, and the Chase Back-to-School Drive, this committee coordinates the community engagement work that makes E100's mission visible and tangible. Community service is also E100's greatest partner acquisition tool — serving alongside a company is the first entrance into the E100 house.
